title: Infused Crystals
description: Adds 6 Different Elemental Crystals And Their Infused Forms! Each Crystal Type Has Its Own Tools!
body:
![Logo](https://i.imgur.com/7HkqFFq.png)

Infused Crystals adds 6 Different Crystals, Their Infused Versions and Tools!

Redstonium
Diamondium
Emeraldium
Ironium
Coalium
Lapisium

![logo2](https://i.imgur.com/76H49Ug.png)

Infused Redstonium
Infused Diamondium
Infused Emeraldium
Infused Ironium
Infused Coalium
Infused Lapisium

![logo3](https://i.imgur.com/PBtOUCJ.png)

All Crystals Types Have Their Own Tools!
And Of Course Charger To Make Them Infused!

To use the Charger, you must put infernal fuel in the fuel slot and the crystal you want to be infused in the upper slot.
Charger only accepts Infernal Fuel as fuel.
 
![logo4](https://i.imgur.com/vXVSuvD_d.webp?maxwidth=760&fidelity=grand)

You Can Join Discord For Your Questions And Suggestions.
You Can Join My Patreon To Support The Project!

 ![logo5](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/78a3b2f0-6ef8-41ac-9cf0-f60c3cb2eb04.png)
